BSc (Hons) Data Science.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. Mathematics A-level strongly recommended. GCSE Maths at grade 5 or above. GCSE English Language at grade 4.

BA (Hons) Accounting and Finance.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. Mathematics or Business A-level preferred. GCSE Maths at grade B/5 and English Language at grade C/4.

BEng (Hons) Electronic Engineering.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. Mathematics and Physics A-levels both required. GCSE Maths at grade B/5.

BSc (Hons) Biomedical Science.req: BBB or 120 UCAS tariff points. Biology or Chemistry A-level required. GCSE Science and Maths at grade B/5. GCSE English Language grade C/4.

BSc (Hons) Architecture (ARB/RIBA Part 1.req: ABB or 128 UCAS tariff points. Art, Design, Maths, or Physics A-level preferred. Portfolio of creative/technical work required – assessed before offer. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade C/4.

BA (Hons) Fashion Design.req: BCC or 104 UCAS tariff points. Art, Design, or Textiles A-level strongly preferred. Portfolio of creative work required – assessed before offer. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade C/4.

BSc (Hons) Environmental Science.req: BBC or 112 UCAS tariff points. Science A-level preferred (Biology, Chemistry, Geography, or Environmental Science). GCSE Maths and English Language at grade C/4.

BA (Hons) Music Technology.req: BCC or 104 UCAS tariff points. Music, Physics, or Computing A-level preferred. Portfolio or audition piece may be required. GCSE English Language and Maths at grade C/4.
